narrative:
Amanda (precinct in Hancock County) has 718 registered voters, with 40.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 52.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 44.8 percentage points.
